message:
fix(runtime): use semver-compatible version check in controller registry

Replace the simple range check (min <= current <= max) with a
semver-aware compatibility check for controller registration:

- SNAPSHOT_VERSION.is_compatible_with(&reg.min_version): ensures the
  current version is semver-compatible with the minimum (same major,
  current >= min).
- SNAPSHOT_VERSION.major != reg.max_version.major: ensures the current
  major version matches the declared maximum major version.

The previous check would incorrectly reject controllers when version
ranges spanned major versions (e.g. min=1.0, max=2.0 would accept
1.5 but the intent was semver compatibility). The new check enforces
that all versions in the range share the same major version, which
is the standard semver contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
